title: Add real-time approval modal when task requires permission
goal: 작업이 approval_required 상태가 되면 프론트엔드에서 실시간 모달을 표시한다. 사용자가 승인/거부 버튼을 누르면 즉시 작업이 이어지거나 취소된다. 조용히 pending 상태로 멈추지 않는다.

test_requirements.case: Main page polls task status after command submission
Approval modal appears when task status is approval_required
test_requirements.expected: modal with task command, risk level, reason, approve/reject buttons

test_requirements.case: Approve button calls approveTask and resumes polling
Reject button calls rejectTask and shows rejection message

constraints: Modal must work in both browser AND Tauri (no window.open, no browser-only APIs)
Use existing Tailwind CSS patterns from setup page
Modal shows: command text, risk level badge, approval reason, approve/reject buttons
Polling stops after task reaches done/failed status or after 60 seconds timeout
Do not add new npm dependencies
Approval modal should overlay current page content, not navigate away
